title: dianthus elegans
intro: Dianthus elegans, also known as the Pink Champak or Fragrant Pink, is a species of flowering plant in the carnation family. It is known for its delicate pink flowers and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting immune function, although more research is needed to confirm these claims. Dianthus elegans can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote relaxation and well-being.
